name: X.Borg
intro: X.Borg, the Firaga Armor, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Firaga Armor
abilities.description: Buff X.Borg's [HP inherits (+20% Extra HP) , and his Firaga Armor inherits (+120% Extra HP) ] and absorbs all incoming damage when it's active. When the Armor is destroyed, X.Borg will disengage from it and roll in the direction of the Joystick (he is immune to damage [and control effects] in this process). The Armor's energy will gradually regenerate [for 3 energy per second] while X.Borg is in the Armorless State. At full energy, X.Borg re-equips the Armor and restore it to 30% of his [ Armor HP ]. X.Borg's skills deal True Damage in Overheated state. Skill terms Max HP The maximum HP currently can have. Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Damage Immunity You are immune to enemy damage effects within the duration.

abilities.name: Fire Missiles
abilities.description: AOE X.Borg sprays fire, dealing 25–100 (+60% Total Physical Attack) (+40% Total Magic Power) Physical Damage 7 times over 2 seconds to enemies in range (75%–100% damage to Minions ). Armorless state: The attack area becomes narrower but longer, while the damage is reduced to 60%. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. True Damage If there is no way to reduce damage taken, you can try increasing Max HP.

abilities.name: Fire Stake
abilities.description: CC X.Borg shoots 5 Fire Stakes at the edge of the fan-shaped indicator and retrieves them after 1.7 seconds, each dealing 50–100 (+20% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and pulling the enemies in the path toward him. Firaga Supplies in the path will also be retrieved if touched by Fire Stakes. Armorless State: X.Borg adjusts Fire Stake Launcher to increase its range and shorten the distance between Fire Stakes. Skill terms Physical Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together.

abilities.name: Last Insanity
abilities.description: Burst Mobility My hometown was once a beautiful place. X.Borg charges forward in the target direction while rotating and spraying fire, dealing 90–110 (+130% Extra Physical Attack) (+90% Total Magic Power) Physical Damage 12 times and slowing enemies by 25%. He stops upon running into an enemy hero and will slow them by an additional 40%. After 3 seconds from the start of the skill, X.Borg's Firaga Armor will detonate, dealing [300–700 (+enemy's 15% Total HP) True Damage to nearby enemies]. If the Armor is destroyed before it can self-detonate, it will only deal 50% of the damage. When his Armor detonates, X.Borg will dash a short distance in the Joystick 's direction and enter Armorless State while removing all debuffs from himself. This skill cannot be used in the Armorless State. Use Again: X.Borg stops spraying fire and immediately detonates his Firaga Armor. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. True Damage If there is no way to reduce damage taken, you can try increasing Max HP. Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles.
